sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n27062" key="dima/xairos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῐ-μάχαιρος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>,</foreign> <sense id="n27062.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with two swords,</tr_> of gladiators, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0553.tlg001:2:32" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Artem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.32</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
